meaning: v.犯罪,冒犯,违反,得罪,使...不愉快
examples: A TV interviewer must be careful not to offend.
Neil did not mean to offend anybody with his joke.
I try to offend the least amount of people possible.
Surprised they didn't see it, but I'm pretty sure there was no intention to offend anyone.
Dell responded quickly, saying it had never intended to offend anyone, least of all women.
